input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.5.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.5.2.2
            TITLE: the egress test will be conducted for each driver as follows:

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5.2.2: The Egress Test will be conducted for each driver as follows:
IN.5.2.2 The Egress Test will be conducted for each driver as follows:   
a. The driver must wear the specified Driver Equipment  VE.3.2, VE.3.3 
b. Egress time begins with the driver in the fully seated position, with hands in driving 
position on the connected steering wheel.  
c. Egress test may have the driver touch the (IC) Cockpit Main Switch IC.9.4  (EV) Shutdown 
Button EV.7.10.4  
d. Egress time will stop when the driver has both feet on the pavement.

final_answer: The Egress Test will be conducted for each driver as follows: a. The driver must wear the specified Driver Equipment VE.3.2, VE.3.3 b. Egress time begins with the driver in the fully seated position, with hands in driving position on the connected steering wheel. c. Egress test may have the driver touch the (IC) Cockpit Main Switch IC.9.4 (EV) Shutdown Button EV.7.10.4 d. Egress time will stop when the driver has both feet on the pavement.
